title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Mastech Holdings is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Mastech Holdings, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Navi Mumbai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Mastech Holdings:
Mastech Holdings is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mastech Holdings!
